jsLib: var doubaoApiBase='https://api.sway99.com/api/app/api/doubao_tts';var doubaoApiKey='8c97b4c7-4ecb-5dc2-3d9b-5987571224c2';var speakerMap={'桃子女声':'taozi','爽快女声':'shuangkuai','甜美女声':'tianmei','清澈女声':'qingche','阳光男声':'male','沉稳男声':'chenwen','英文女声':'en_female'};function doubaoTTS(text,speed){var info=this.source.getLoginInfoMap();var speaker=info.get('音色')||'桃子女声';var speakerId=speakerMap[speaker]||'taozi';var apiSpeed=Math.max(-100,Math.min(100,(speed-5)*20));var pitch=info.get('音调')||'0';var url=doubaoApiBase+'?action=synthesize&text='+encodeURIComponent(text)+'&speaker='+speakerId+'&speed='+apiSpeed+'&pitch='+pitch+'&api_key='+doubaoApiKey;var response=java.ajax(url);var json=JSON.parse(response);if(json.code===0&&json.data&&json.data.audio_url){return json.data.audio_url}else{throw new Error(json.msg||'TTS合成失败')}}
name: 豆包TTS语音合成
